physicalDetails.detail: Young prince in light field plate built for movement, command sash cleaner than the rest of the camp, filling a tent the way certainty fills a room before words do.

voiceMarkers.detail: Courteous, direct, and practiced at sounding warm without surrendering command authority. He listens in full, then answers as a man used to making the final choice.

beliefs.belief: The war burning in front of him must take priority over a slower threat he cannot yet strike directly.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Active at chapter6 end; not disproved on-page here.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Clear the Blackrock raiders out of the Strahnbrad corridor and keep the living villages on that road from burning today.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Defend Lordaeron with the forces presently in his hand.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Courteous, focused, and certain under battlefield pressure. He hears the warning and refuses without visible cruelty or hesitation.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Dismisses his officers to hear Jaina's warning in private and reads her notes carefully instead of brushing them aside unread.
Refuses to divert men from the Blackrock-raider fight, offering only to include the warning in his next report and act later if harder proof arrives.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Reads operational intelligence in command terms—roads, wagons, distances, and where mounted units can still arrive before dark.
Controls a battlefield room with ease, dismissing subordinates and refocusing the conversation without losing momentum.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Jaina Proudmoore
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Uses Arthas directly in a register that begins familiar and turns strategic under pressure.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Sylvanas Windrunner
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Your Highness — full protocol, no warmth added.

howHeAddressesOthers.pattern: Jaina immediately, with warmth first and command authority underneath it.
Ranger-General, smooth political formality acknowledging rank without sharing power.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Keeps both hands on the map table while listening, sets papers down with deliberate care when buying time to answer, and makes even stillness feel like command motion paused.

knowledge.detail: Knows Jaina has traced the plague toward Andorhal through grain routes, cleaned depots, and a still-unproven Barov overlap.
Understands the warning well enough to identify Andorhal as the center of the road web, but still prioritizes the immediate Blackrock threat.

arc.lie: A threat becomes real command business only when soldiers can see it, strike it, and defend civilians from it immediately.
arc.truth: Invisible rot can demand action before a battlefield forms.
arc.currentPosition: Still anchored in the visible-war frame. He treats the plague as serious but secondary because it lacks a front line he can attack today.
